---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for agentgrade
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation. E.g. "I'm always frustrated
when ..."

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen (e.g. a new check type, a new
framework adapter, a new credit-assignment heuristic, or a CLI flag).

## Describe alternatives you've considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've
considered.

## Scope / compatibility

- Does this keep agentgrade deterministic and offline (no required API keys)?
- Does it change any existing example reward/credit output?

## Additional context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here.
